Product number Description 3910900063 #4-0 XBraid S, white/blue, whip stitch suture, BB (taper, 3/8c, 17mm), 10" loop length 3910900122 #4-0 XBraid S, white/blue, whip stitch suture, ST-1 (straight taper needle, 60mm), 10" suture loop 3910900062 #2-0 XBraid S, white/blue, whip stitch suture, CT-3 (taper, 1/2c, 22mm), 20" loop length 3910900121 #2-0 XBraid S, white/blue, whip stitch suture, ST-1 (straight taper needle, 60mm), 20" suture loop 3910900061 #0 XBraid S, white/blue, whip stitch suture, CT-3 (taper, 1/2c, 22mm), 20" loop length 3910900120 #0 XBraid S, white/blue, whip stitch suture, ST-1 (straight taper needle, 60mm), 20" suture loop 3910900060 #2 XBraid S, white/blue, whip stitch suture, ST-1 (straight taper needle, 60mm) 20" suture with 18" loop 3910900123 #2 XBraid S, blue/black, whip stitch suture, ST-1 (straight taper needle, 60mm), 18" suture loop 3910900064 1.4mm XBraid TT, white/blue, whip stitch suture tape, ST-1 (straight taper needle, 60mm), 20" suture with 18" loop 3910900124 1.4mm XBraid TT, blue/black, whip stitch suture, ST-1 (straight taper needle, 60mm), 18" suture loop Whip Stitch XBraid Whip Stitch has tape and suture options, ideal for multi-strand tendon repair. Loops are available in various sizes and colors including a smaller 10" option up to a 20" option. Product number Description 3910900076 #2 XBraid S, white/blue, XPass suture with loop, non-needled, 26" suture (one end stiffened 12", other end .75" loop) 3910900112 #2 XBraid S, white/blue, XPass shuttle loop suture, non-needled, 32" suture with 1" Brummel center loop 3910900113 #2 XBraid S, blue/black, XPass shuttle loop suture, non-needled, 32" suture with 1" center loop XPass with Loop XBraid XPass with Loop provides a looped suture with a stiffened tip to facilitate passage though bone tunnels Product number Description HS4702 #2-0 SharpShooter suture, white/blue, 13" straight trocar needle on both ends, 30" suture HS4704 #2-0 SharpShooter suture, white UHMWPE suture, 13" straight trocar needle on both ends, 36.5" Suture PB4704 #2-0 SharpShooter suture, green polyester suture, 13" straight trocar needle on both ends, 36" suture 3910900114 #2-0 XBraid S, white/blue, SharpShooter shuttle needle, ST-13 blunt (blunt point needle, 330mm), 0.75" loop 3910900115 #2-0 XBraid S, white/blue, SharpShooter shuttle needle, ST-13 (trocar point needle, 330mm), 0.75" loop HS4703 1.0mm SharpShooter suture tape, blue/black, 13" straight trocar needle on both ends, 30" suture with 5" suture tape SharpShooter XBraid SharpShooter includes 13” double armed long trocar meniscal needles to provide an excellent option for standard inside-out meniscal repair procedures.
